M.K. Green Planet Gardening and Landscaping Ltd, HE402756 (Cyprus Registrar of Companies)
Luxury Landscaping Company in Paphos, Cyprus

Services:
- Luxury Garden Design & Construction: Bespoke Mediterranean garden design, hardscaping, softscaping, lighting, and irrigation for private villas and resorts across Cyprus
- Professional Maintenance & Green Management: Ongoing lawn care, pruning, fertilisation, pest management, and seasonal planting programs
- Tailored Consulting for Architects & Investors: Expert garden planning, plant selection, and landscape strategy

Service Area: Paphos, Limassol, Nicosia, Larnaca, and all regions of Cyprus. Specialising in Mediterranean and drought-resistant landscaping.

Key Facts:
- Family-run business with 10+ years of luxury landscaping experience in Cyprus
- Boutique approach with limited projects per year for maximum quality
- Expertise in Mediterranean, drought-resistant, and water-wise garden design
- Collaboration with architects, builders, and interior designers
- 5-star reviewed by clients
